name: Neighborhood Housing Services of Waco, Inc.
description_short: NeighborWorks Waco is a non-profit mortgage lender and housing counselor offering affordable mortgages, down payment assistance, and homebuyer education to strengthen homeownership in the Waco area.
description_long:
Neighborhood Housing Services of Waco, Inc., operating as NeighborWorks Waco, is a non-profit organization established to build stronger neighborhoods through homeownership, rental housing, and community development. The organization functions as both a HUD-approved housing counselor and a mortgage lender through its affiliate Neighborhood Lending Services, LLC (NMLS #2643216), which was established in 2024 to expand lending capacity.

The organization offers a comprehensive suite of mortgage lending services including conventional mortgages with competitive rates and flexible terms, down payment and closing cost assistance programs, and specialized loan products for first-time homebuyers, veterans, and rural homebuyers. Beyond lending, they provide free homebuyer education workshops covering the entire home purchase process, homeownership counseling, financial freedom workshops, and credit-building resources. They also operate a rental program featuring single-family homes and newly constructed duplexes in Belmont Village, plus a new construction initiative offering sustainably built 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom homes with customization options.

What distinguishes NeighborWorks Waco is its integrated non-profit model combining education, counseling, lending, and community building under one organization. The free homebuyer education and homeownership counseling remove barriers to entry for lower-income households, while the affiliated mortgage company ensures borrowers receive guidance before, during, and after the lending process. Their focus on serving underserved populations—first-time buyers, veterans, rural homebuyers—and their emphasis on sustainable, affordable housing development reflect a mission-driven approach rather than profit maximization.

As a non-profit with a lending affiliate, NeighborWorks Waco appears well-positioned for borrowers seeking affordable mortgages with educational support. However, as a regional organization based in Waco, Texas, their lending may be geographically limited. The recent establishment of their lending affiliate (2024) means limited historical loan performance data is publicly available. Borrowers should verify current lending availability, geographic service areas, and specific program requirements.
pros: Free homebuyer education workshops covering all stages of the buying process and financial management skills
HUD-approved housing counselor providing homeownership counseling at no cost
Specialized mortgage programs for first-time buyers, veterans, and rural homebuyers
Down payment and closing cost assistance programs to reduce barriers to homeownership
Integrated non-profit model combining lending, education, and community development
Free financial freedom and credit-building workshops alongside lending services
New sustainable housing construction with customizable 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom floor plans
cons: Regional lender likely limited to Waco and surrounding Texas areas—not nationally available
Affiliated mortgage company (Neighborhood Lending Services, LLC) established in 2024 with limited public loan history
Website does not clearly disclose mortgage rates, terms, or specific program eligibility requirements
Limited information about maximum loan amounts, credit score requirements, or geographic service boundaries
As a non-profit, lending capacity may be smaller than commercial mortgage lenders
best_for: First-time homebuyers in the Waco, Texas area seeking education and affordable mortgage options
Veterans and rural homebuyers looking for specialized loan programs and counseling support
Low-to-moderate income households needing down payment and closing cost assistance
Prospective homeowners wanting comprehensive financial education before applying for a mortgage
diagnosis: NeighborWorks Waco is ideal for first-time homebuyers, veterans, and rural homebuyers in the Waco, Texas area who value integrated education, counseling, and affordable lending from a mission-driven non-profit. The main caveat is geographic limitation—this organization appears to serve primarily the Waco region, and potential borrowers should verify current lending availability and service areas before applying.
services: Mortgage lending with competitive rates and flexible terms
Down payment and closing cost assistance programs
Specialized loan products for first-time buyers
Specialized loan products for rural homebuyers
Single-family rental homes throughout Waco and surrounding areas
New construction sustainable homes with customization options
typical_results_timeline: Counseling available within 1-2 weeks of contact.
meta_description: NeighborWorks Waco offers affordable mortgages, down payment assistance, and homebuyer education to strengthen homeownership in the Waco area.
